name: SEA Thai Bistro
seoDescription: SEA Thai Bistro in Santa Rosa's Montgomery Village is voted Best Thai Restaurant in Sonoma County: chef-owner Tony Ounpamornchai blends authentic Thai

sections.heading: Voted Best Thai in Sonoma County
sections.subheading: Chef-owner Tony Ounpamornchai blends authentic Thai cooking with modern California ingredients in Montgomery Village.

items.title: Modern Thai Kitchen
items.description: Authentic Thai dishes blended with modern California ingredients, made to order.

items.title: Craft Bar & Cocktails
items.description: A full bar with craft cocktails and an extensive drink list.

items.title: Lunch & Dinner
items.description: Served in Montgomery Village, with patio seating available.

items.title: Catering & Private Dining
items.description: Catering and private events for gatherings across Sonoma County.

sections.heading: About SEA Thai Bistro
body: SEA Thai Bistro is the work of chef-owner Tony Ounpamornchai, whose Thai heritage and modern sensibility come together in a menu that dynamically blends Asian and contemporary American ingredients. The result has been voted Best Thai Restaurant in Sonoma County by The Press Democrat.

Tucked into Santa Rosa's Montgomery Village, SEA pairs that outstanding food with craft cocktails and attentive service in a lively bistro setting, a longtime local favorite that diners return to again and again.

items.title: Best Thai In Sonoma County
items.body: A standard we hold on every job, not just the easy ones.

items.title: Chef-Owner Tony Ounpamornchai
